text: I am enveloped by a sense of possibility and curiosity. The sharp lines and glowing signs speak to order and safety, yet the translucent glass reveals an open realm of thought and experimentation just beyond reach. Upon entering, the R+D wall and displays urge me to reflect on the relationship between learning and innovation, between human ingenuity and artificial intelligence. I feel both humbled and energized, connected to the larger narrative of discovery and the search for understanding among machines and minds.
